care.summary: A popular holiday cactus with segmented, flattened stems and vibrant winter blooms.
care.light: Bright indirect light; avoid direct midday sun
care.water: Keep moist while blooming; allow top inch to dry between waterings after bloom
care.soil: Well-draining, slightly acidic potting mix with peat or orchid bark
care.humidity: Moderate to high; enjoys occasional misting
care.fertilizer: Feed monthly with balanced liquid fertilizer spring through summer; use bloom booster in autumn
common_issues: Bud drop from overwatering or temperature swings
Root rot in poorly draining soil
Leggy growth if light is too low
tips: Cool night temperatures (12-15°C) in autumn encourage bud formation
Reduce water in late autumn to trigger blooming
Prune after flowering to encourage branching
